author: The Seventh Ecumenical Council. The Second Council of Nice
book: The Canons of the Holy and Ecumenical Seventh Council.

classification.cautionReason: Conciliar or creedal material received in mainstream Nicene Christian tradition, with denominational differences on some canons.

lineage: The Seventh Ecumenical Council. The Second Council of Nice.
The Canons of the Holy and Ecumenical Seventh Council.

metadata.author: The Seventh Ecumenical Council. The Second Council of Nice

title: Canon XVII.

verses.book: The Canons of the Holy and Ecumenical Seventh Council.
verses.text: That he shall not be allowed to begin the building of an oratory, who has not the means wherewith to finish it.

verses.book: The Canons of the Holy and Ecumenical Seventh Council.
verses.text: Certain monks having left their monasteries because they desired to rule, and, unwilling to obey, are undertaking to build oratories, but have not the means to finish them.

verses.book: The Canons of the Holy and Ecumenical Seventh Council.
verses.text: Now whoever shall undertake to do anything of this sort, let him be forbidden by the bishop of the place.

verses.book: The Canons of the Holy and Ecumenical Seventh Council.
verses.text: But if he have the means wherewith to finish, let what he has designed be carried on to completion.

verses.book: The Canons of the Holy and Ecumenical Seventh Council.
verses.text: The same rule is to be observed with regard to laymen and clerics.

verses.book: The Canons of the Holy and Ecumenical Seventh Council.
The Canons of the Holy and Ecumenical Seventh Council.
verses.text: Whoever wishes to build a monastery, if he has the wherewithal to finish it, let him begin the work, and let him bring it to a conclusion.

verses.book: The Canons of the Holy and Ecumenical Seventh Council.
verses.text: But if not, let him be prohibited by the bishop of the place.

verses.book: The Canons of the Holy and Ecumenical Seventh Council.
verses.text: The same law shall apply to laymen and monks.

verses.book: The Canons of the Holy and Ecumenical Seventh Council.
verses.text: Van Espen refers to Gratian’s Decretum, Pars.

verses.book: The Canons of the Holy and Ecumenical Seventh Council.
The Canons of the Holy and Ecumenical Seventh Council.
The Canons of the Holy and Ecumenical Seventh Council.
verses.text: Balsamon also refers his readers to the Fourth Book of the Basilica, title I., chapter I., which is part of Justinian’s cxxiij.

verses.book: The Canons of the Holy and Ecumenical Seventh Council.
verses.text: Novel, also to the first canon of the so-called First-and-Second Council held at Constantinople in the Church of the Holy Apostles.
